/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/CameraSensorDashboard.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/CameraSensorDashboard.dir/CameraSensorDashboard_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CameraSensorDashboard.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CameraSensorDashboard.dir/src/CameraCapture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CameraSensorDashboard.dir/src/SensorDataGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CameraSensorDashboard.dir/src/DataLogger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CameraSensorDashboard.dir/src/PlaybackController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CameraSensorDashboard.dir/src/ImageProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CameraSensorDashboard.dir/qrc_qml.cpp.o -o camera-sensor-dashboard  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6QuickControls2.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Charts.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Multimedia.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_highgui.so.4.10.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Quick.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6QmlMeta.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6QmlWorkerScript.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6QmlModels.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Qml.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGLWidgets.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_videoio.so.4.10.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.10.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.10.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.4.10.0
